title: Nutty Fluffy Dutch Beef Stir-fry
description: A comforting dutch dish featuring beef gravy and nuttiness, perfect for a low-calorie-friendly meal.
instructions: Chop the onion, garlic, bell pepper, carrot into small pieces.
Slice the beef thinly, season with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat up some oil. Sauté onions, add chopped garlic.
Add sliced carrots, cook for about 3 minutes until slightly softened.
Add diced bell peppers, continue cooking until veggies are soft.
Mix in peanut butter, stir well to prevent clumping. Gradually pour in vegetable broth and water, whisking continuously.
Stir occasionally to avoid sticking. Once the mixture thickens slightly (about 5 minutes), add nutritional yeast for nutty flavor.
Sprinkle thyme leaves over the dish, adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or rice.
